code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    mut result = ""
    mut first = true
    mut cur = 0
    mut has = false
    mut neg = false
    mut i = 0
    let n = string.len(line)
    while i <= n
      mut b = 0
      if i < n
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(v)
          b = v
        when None
          b = 32
        end
      else
        b = 32
      end
      let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
      if is_digit
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        has = true
      else if b == 45 and not has
        neg = true
      else
        if has
          mut val = cur
          if neg
            val = 0 - val
          end
          let sq = val * val
          if first
            result = "#{sq}"
            first = false
          else
            result = "#{result} #{sq}"
          end
          cur = 0
          has = false
          neg = false
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println(result)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
